description_long: This is a single-story rectangular house surrounded by a wooden fence, featuring a spacious open-plan living and dining area, multiple bedrooms, and a large tiled patio. The house includes two blue rectangular pools or water features on either side of the main entrance, and a green walkway leading up to the front door. The exterior walls are primarily white with brown accents, and the roof is flat, allowing for a modern, streamlined appearance. Large windows are distributed across the facade, providing ample natural light to the interior spaces. The backyard area is partially paved and includes outdoor seating, while the front yard is landscaped with grass and pathways. The overall layout is open and functional, with clear separation between private and communal spaces.
description: A modern, single-story rectangular house with a flat roof, white walls, brown accents, and two blue pools flanking a central entrance, all enclosed by a wooden fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, two blue pools, a green walkway, and the symmetrical layout of the house within a fenced yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large tiled patio, backyard seating area, and the open-plan living space with visible interior furnishings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the spacious patio, outdoor seating, and the arrangement of windows and doors leading to the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the back of the house, additional windows, and the placement of the pools relative to the structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with a straight walkway, flanked by pools, featuring a simple door and no porch or overhang.
